gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用错位的语音留言编织出跨越生死的浪漫，温柔又惊喜。
gems.whyWatchEn: A tender and surprising romance woven through misdirected voicemails that bridge life and death.
gems.audience: 喜欢细腻情感、非典型浪漫故事的观众，以及《电子情书》式老派通讯浪漫的爱好者。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of nuanced emotion and unconventional romance, and lovers of old-school communication charm like 'You've Got Mail'.

gems.title: 火遮眼
gems.summary: 女儿在街头被拐走，店主（谢苗 饰）探寻一个复杂的犯罪网络，不择手段将女儿救回来。他唯一的盟友是一名记者（乔•塔斯利姆 饰）。这两个来自不同背景的人物必须学会相互信任、合作，运用自己不为人知的过去所赋予的格斗技能。
gems.summaryEn: After Wang Wei's daughter is kidnapped by a criminal network and he receives no help from the corrupt police, Wei sets out to find her himself. His only ally is Navin, a relentless journalist whose wi
gems.whyWatch: 硬核打斗与父爱执念碰撞，谢苗的复仇之路拳拳到肉。
gems.whyWatchEn: Brutal action meets a father's obsession—Xie Miao's revenge path is visceral and relentless.
gems.audience: 热衷写实动作片、谢苗影迷，以及喜欢《飓风营救》式高强度救女故事的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of gritty action cinema, Xie Miao followers, and viewers who enjoy high-stakes rescue stories like 'Taken'.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 当经典玩具遭遇数字时代，用童趣反思屏幕依赖。
gems.whyWatchEn: Classic toys confront the digital age—a playful yet poignant reflection on screen addiction.
gems.audience: 《玩具总动员》系列铁粉、有孩子的家庭观众，以及关注数字时代儿童成长的家长。
gems.audienceEn: Toy Story franchise loyalists, families with children, and parents concerned about kids' digital habits.
